name: Pork Chops in Onion Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Thinly slice the onions.
2. Season pork chops with salt and pepper; coat with flour.
3. Heat oil in a heavy frypan.
4. Add pork chops and fry for 3 minutes on each side.
5. Add sliced onions and cook for another 5 minutes, turning chops once.
6. Pour in beer and beef broth; cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
7. Remove pork chops to a preheated platter.
8. Season sauce to taste.
9. Blend cornstarch with a small amount of cold water.
10. Stir into sauce and cook until thick and bubbly.
11. Pour sauce over pork chops.
12. Serve with Brussels sprouts and boiled potatoes.
